dependency_decision.reason: Keep the private system from publishing or cloning private materials into the public gate while still making public-safe schemas, validators, fixtures, CLI entrypoints, and smoke checks reproducible.

update_flow: Fetch public gate release/tag metadata or default-branch commit SHA.
Record the candidate version and pin in the private dependency manifest.
Run public-safe schema/fixture/smoke checks against the candidate.
Run private boundary validators before any sync or release-candidate promotion.
Update the private pin only after operator review.
Keep the previous known-good pin available for rollback.
forbidden_flows: automatic upload of private references to the public gate
default telemetry or usage reporting through the public gate
publishing workspace manifests or registry activation data
committing raw local paths, Drive links, tokens, workspace codes, or work logs
